title: Savills India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Savills India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Savills India in Noida offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Savills India:
Savills India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Savills India!
